title: eritrichium heliotropioides
intro: Eritrichium heliotropioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the western globe daisy or heliotrope globular daisy. It is native to the western United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Eritrichium heliotropioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural health solutions.
